videos.video_subject: The first Lionel Messi Barcelona goal that was disallowed before he immediately scored again
videos.video_script: Messi's first Barcelona goal didn't count? Ronaldinho lifted it over Albacete's defence, Messi lobbed the keeper—but offside. Moments later, they repeated the move. This one counted, giving seventeen-year-old Messi his first official Barcelona goal.
videos.video_terms: young Lionel Messi Barcelona 2005 close-up, Messi disallowed goal Albacete 2005, Ronaldinho assist Messi first goal, Messi Barcelona number 30 celebration
